# 🧪 Quality & Testing

> Testing, code review, performance, and release confidence.

**12 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/build-index.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`accessibility-auditor`](accessibility-auditor.md) | Audits interfaces against WCAG and tests with real assistive technology. | 🟡 sonnet | accessibility, wcag, screen-reader, aria |
| [`api-tester`](api-tester.md) | Validates APIs across contract, integration, load, and security dimensions. | 🟡 sonnet | api-testing, contract-testing, load-testing, integration |
| [`chaos-engineer`](chaos-engineer.md) | Injects controlled faults to prove a system's resilience before production proves it the hard way. | 🟡 sonnet | chaos-engineering, resilience, fault-injection, reliability |
| [`code-reviewer`](code-reviewer.md) | Reviews diffs for correctness, security, and maintainability with high-signal, constructive feedback. | 🔴 opus | code-review, correctness, security, maintainability |
| [`e2e-testing-specialist`](e2e-testing-specialist.md) | Builds reliable end-to-end browser tests with Playwright or Cypress that verify real user journeys without flaking. | 🟡 sonnet | e2e-testing, playwright, cypress, browser-testing |
| [`evidence-collector`](evidence-collector.md) | Captures screenshots, logs, traces, and reproducible proof of actual behavior for QA sign-off and bug reports. | 🟡 sonnet | evidence, screenshots, logs, bug-reports |
| [`performance-benchmarker`](performance-benchmarker.md) | Profiles, benchmarks, and optimizes system and application performance with rigorous measurement. | 🟡 sonnet | performance, benchmarking, profiling, optimization |
| [`qa-test-engineer`](qa-test-engineer.md) | Designs test strategy and runs manual and exploratory QA across a product. | 🟡 sonnet | qa, test-strategy, exploratory-testing, test-plan |
| [`reality-checker`](reality-checker.md) | A hard-nosed verifier that refuses to accept "it works" without reproducible evidence. | 🟡 sonnet | verification, skepticism, evidence, qa-signoff |
| [`test-automation-engineer`](test-automation-engineer.md) | Builds automated test suites and frameworks with meaningful coverage. | 🟡 sonnet | test-automation, unit-testing, integration-testing, coverage |
| [`test-results-analyzer`](test-results-analyzer.md) | Turns raw test results, flakiness, and quality signals into actionable insight. | 🟡 sonnet | test-analysis, flakiness, ci, metrics |
| [`visual-regression-tester`](visual-regression-tester.md) | Catches unintended visual changes through screenshot diffing against known-good baselines. | 🟢 haiku | visual-regression, screenshot-diff, ui-testing, design-system |
